name: Suspicious Process Execution via Pester Detected
description: Detects code execution via Pester.bat, a PowerShell module for testing, which can be abused for malicious purposes.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed (e.g., powershell.exe or cmd.exe).

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used, indicating Pester execution.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
